brief_notes: Interesting revision of POP1/POP2 inflammasome inhibitor specificity using computational and experimental approaches. Strengths: clear contradiction of a prior report with systematic evidence, nice division-of-labor model, integration of Rosetta modeling with in vitro and cell-based validation. Weaknesses: Rosetta docking results are described qualitatively without interface energy scores or statistical measures, no figures, in vitro filament assays lack quantitative metrics (e.g., IC50 for each POP-PYD pair, percent inhibition at defined ratios), cell-based assays described without quantitative data (no fold-changes, no p-values in tables), and the paper would benefit from mutagenesis experiments guided by the computational predictions. The tables are more descriptive than quantitative.
